title: Retried charges double-charge customers
body: PaymentsService.charge has no idempotency key, so a client retry creates a second charge for the same order.

title: Amount not validated at controller
body: PaymentsController.charge passes amount straight through; negative/zero amounts only fail deep in the gateway. Add a DTO validator.

title: Refund does not verify charge exists
body: refund calls the gateway without checking the chargeId is known locally, allowing refunds for unknown charges.

title: No webhook endpoint for async gateway events
body: The PSP sends async settlement webhooks but there is no controller route to receive them.

title: Gateway charge id uses Math.random
body: GatewayClient generates fake ids with Math.random which can collide. Use a proper unique id.

title: Repo cannot list charges for reconciliation
body: PaymentsRepo only finds by order. Add a method to list all records for daily reconciliation.

title: Module does not export PaymentsService
body: Other modules cannot inject PaymentsService because AppModule does not export it.
